---
title: "tangerine_part2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Reproducibility assessment

## 1- Analytical reproduction assessment

```{r}
We tried to 


```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false



```

## 2- Computational reproduction assessment

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

## 3- Computational reproduction assessment
